title: Epic: Space methods (full Space API)
description:
Why: Zero Space methods exist in the current codebase. Spaces (federated multi-chat containers) are a core JMAP Chat concept. Without Space support the client cannot participate in federated channels or manage Space membership.

What:
- Space/get and Space/changes
- Space/set: create Space, update metadata (name, description, avatar, membershipPolicy), destroy Space
- Space/query and Space/queryChanges
- Space join flow: SpaceInvite/set accept action triggers membership
- Permission checks for channel-scoped operations (pin permission gating)
- Fixture tests for all methods

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq), methods refactor epic
